---
title: Wellbeing Study Design
author: Jürgen Wilbert
date: '2026-02-21'
categories:
  - wellbeing
  - presentation
abstract: 'Short description of study design on psychological wellbeing'
format: 
  revealjs:
    scrollable: true
    theme: style.scss
mermaid:
  theme: default
toc: false
---

## 

### Definitions Psychological Wellbeing {.smaller}

```{mermaid}
flowchart TB
    A2[Was sind die
    Konstituenten des 
    Wohlbefindens?]
    A3["`**PERMA**<br>
    Positive Emotions
    Engagement
    Relations
    Meaning
    Accomplishment`"]
    
    B2[Was sind die 
    Ursachen des 
    Wohlbefindens?]
    B3["`**Self-Determination Theory**<br>
    Autonomy
    Relatedness
    Competence`"]

    C2[Wie erfassen/ 
    erkennen wir 
    Wohlbefinden?]
    C3["`**Subjective Wellbeing**<br>
    Positive Emotions
    Negative Emotions
    Life Satisaction`"]

    subgraph "`***Präskriptiv - Formal***`"
    direction TB
    A2:::orange ==o A3
    end
    subgraph "`***Explanativ - Kausal***`"
    direction TB
    B2:::orange ==o B3
    end
    subgraph "`***Deskriptiv - Operational***`"
    direction TB
    C2:::orange ==o C3
    end
    
    classDef orange fill: orange
```


## 

### Framework {.smaller}

```{mermaid}
flowchart TB

subgraph perma ["`***PERMA***`"]
PERMA["`
    Positive Emotions
    Engagement
    Relations
    Meaning
    Accomplishment`"]
end

subgraph sit ["`***Situative Kontexte***`"]
direction TB
SIT("`Seminare-Vorlesungen
Prüfungen
Sozialleben unter Studierenden
Interaktionen mit Dozierenden
Studienverwaltung
Finanzielle Situation`")
end

subgraph swb ["`***Subjective Well being***`"]
direction TB
SWB("`Positive Emotions
Negative Emotions
Life Satisfaction`")
end

subgraph bpn ["`***Basic Psychological Needs***`"]
direction TB
BPN("`Autonomy
Relatedness
Competence
`")
end

subgraph state ["`***State***`"]
direction LR
perma ==o|Dimensions| sit
end

subgraph trait ["`***Trait***`"]
direction LR
bpn ==>|Frustration| swb
bpn ==>|Satisfaction| swb
end

state ==> trait

style state fill:LightBlue, stroke:black
style trait fill:LightBlue, stroke:black

```
